updates.summary: Reflected new CORS default (https://poe.lama-lan.ch), ML scanner fields (mlInfluenceScore, effectiveConfidence), and gold diagnostics (v_gold_mart_diagnostics) in operator and planning docs.
Integrated Playwright browser tests into the deterministic review gate (make ci-deterministic) and updated CI workflow to install Playwright dependencies.

internal_resolved: CORS default allowlist for production frontend
QA Playwright test integration into CI

external_remaining.details: service:cxapi, service:leagues, and account:* scopes remain blocked by upstream credential restrictions (invalid_scope).
external_remaining.impact: Defers Currency Exchange market-making, league-phase regime models, and private stash sync to v3.

external_remaining.details: Full end-to-end validation of ingestion pipelines requires live production credentials.
external_remaining.impact: Limits CI/QA to deterministic fixtures and seeded fault profiles.

commands.notes: Confirmed ML scanner fields are documented.
